ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular, admin, compliance officer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "kyc_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's KYC verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakes" (
  "stake_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stake */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the stake */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address associated with the stake */,
  "estimated_icx" REAL /* Estimated ICX value associated with the stake */,
  "stake_amount" REAL /* Initial amount staked by the user */,
  "total_delegated" REAL /* Total amount delegated by the user */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the user */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the stake */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator associated with the stake */,
  "staking_date" TEXT /* Date when the stake was made */,
  "unbonding_period" INTEGER /* Number of blocks for the unbonding period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the stake (e.g., active, pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakes_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currency ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakes_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unstaking" (
  "unstake_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unstake operation */,
  "stake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stake being unstaked */,
  "unstake_amount" REAL /* Amount being unstaked */,
  "unstake_block_height" INTEGER /* Block height for the unstaking operation */,
  "remaining_blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks remaining for unstaking to complete */,
  "unstake_date" TEXT /* Date when the unstaking request was made */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date when the unstaking will be completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the unstake operation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the unstake operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unstake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unstaking_stake_id FOREIGN KEY ("stake_id") REFERENCES stakes ("stake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validators" (
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validator */,
  "validator_name" TEXT /* Name of the validator */,
  "total_bonded" REAL /* Total amount bonded to the validator */,
  "total_stakes" INTEGER /* Total number of stakes associated with the validator */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate charged by the validator */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the validator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validator (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the validator was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the validator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "stake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stake related to the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., stake, unstake) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stake_id FOREIGN KEY ("stake_id") REFERENCES stakes ("stake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currency ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stake_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "stake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stake related to the history record */,
  "balance_before" REAL /* User's balance before the transaction */,
  "balance_after" REAL /* User's balance after the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., stake, unstake) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the action */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stake_history_stake_id FOREIGN KEY ("stake_id") REFERENCES stakes ("stake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance analysis record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user related to the analysis */,
  "stake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stake being analyzed */,
  "estimated_return" REAL /* Estimated return from the stake */,
  "actual_return" REAL /* Actual return from the stake */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of performance analysis */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score of the stake */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the stake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analysis_stake_id FOREIGN KEY ("stake_id") REFERENCES stakes ("stake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analysis_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currency ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., stake, unstake, performance update) */,
  "trigger" TEXT /* Trigger for the notification (e.g., system, user action) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user related to the compliance */,
  "stake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stake related to the compliance */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance (e.g., KYC, AML) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance was checked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_stake_id FOREIGN KEY ("stake_id") REFERENCES stakes ("stake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user related to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* Blockchain where the currency is used */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the currency was added */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the currency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)
